title: Nexozen
body:
## What is this plugin?
This plugin is an addon for the popular free scripting language [Denizen](https://denizenscript.com/), which extends Denizen syntax and functionality to work with another plugin called [Nexo](https://polymart.org/product/6901/nexo) using its API.

## What does it add?
You can read about the plugin on it's wiki https://nine.gitbook.io/nexozen
